Current Behavior: Login is local and accepts form submission without backend validation.
Gap: No real user identity, token, session refresh, or auth errors.
Recommended Next Step: Add auth API integration and persisted session bootstrap.

Current Behavior: Onboarding completion is stored in memory.
Gap: Reloading or new sessions cannot reliably know completion state.
Recommended Next Step: Store onboarding fields on User and load them after login.

Current Behavior: Game lists and detail pages use static arrays.
Gap: No live availability, real participant counts, or per-ID detail loading.
Recommended Next Step: Add game list/detail API hooks and loading/error states.

Current Behavior: Create game form only shows a success state.
Gap: New games are not persisted and placeholder ID new is used.
Recommended Next Step: Submit to backend and route with returned game ID.

Gap: Participant status is not saved or shared across screens.
Recommended Next Step: Add join/leave endpoint and refresh currentUserStatus.

Current Behavior: Nearby court data is static and Austin-centered.
Gap: No real geospatial search or user-location filtering.
Recommended Next Step: Connect court search API using lat/lng, filters, and radius.

Current Behavior: Filter screens display options but do not apply selections.
Gap: Users expect filtered results after tapping apply.
Recommended Next Step: Add filter state model and pass query parameters to list screens.

Gap: Query text does not call a search backend or update results dynamically.
Recommended Next Step: Add debounced search endpoint with categories and empty/loading/error states.

Gap: Membership is not created, removed, or reflected in counts.
Recommended Next Step: Add join/leave club mutation and member count refresh.

Current Behavior: Create club form only uses local state.
Gap: New club records are not persisted.
Recommended Next Step: Add create-club API and route to returned club ID.

Current Behavior: Game and club chat areas use static messages.
Gap: No real conversations, message sending, or live updates.
Recommended Next Step: Add message API or realtime channel after core game/club entities are live.

Current Behavior: Notification list is static with local read state.
Gap: No server-side inbox, push delivery, or durable read status.
Recommended Next Step: Add notification API and optional Web Push integration.

Current Behavior: Edit profile form does not persist.
Gap: Profile changes disappear after screen remount/reload.
Recommended Next Step: Connect update-profile endpoint and shared user store.

Current Behavior: Some settings row IDs may not map to implemented screens.
Gap: Tapping placeholder rows can navigate to default fallback behavior.
Recommended Next Step: Add settings detail screens or disable unavailable rows.

Gap: Browser refresh loses screen context and external links cannot target entities.
Recommended Next Step: Introduce route definitions with React Router or another route layer.

Current Behavior: Many screens use custom button/card/chip classes directly.
Gap: Shared primitives exist but are not consistently adopted.
Recommended Next Step: Incrementally replace repeated patterns with Button, Card, and Chip.
